ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_term" TEXT /* Term of the account (e.g., 3 Month, 6 Month) */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of interest rate (e.g., Fixed, Variable) */,
  "min_balance" TEXT /* Minimum balance required to earn dividends */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Savings, Checking, Money Market) */,
  "max_balance" TEXT /* Maximum balance allowed in the account */,
  "early_withdrawal_fee" TEXT /* Fee for early withdrawal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the rate belongs to */,
  "dividend_rate" TEXT /* Dividend rate for the account */,
  "apy" TEXT /* APY (Annual Percentage Yield) for the account */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate becomes effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate expires */,
  "is_variable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rate is variable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the rate was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_rates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_rates_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the customer (encrypted for security) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_holders" (
  "holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account holder */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the holder owns */,
  "account_open_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account holder (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "is_joint_account" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is a joint account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_holders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_holders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the activity belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "balance_after_transaction" TEXT /* Balance after the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the transaction */,
  "processed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who processed the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_activity_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_activity_processed_by FOREIGN KEY ("processed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., account manager, customer service representative, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., error, warning) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., Error, Warning, Info) */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table affected by the event */,
  "affected_row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected row */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
